reviews.review_description: So pleased with this, keep getting friends to try Apollo but takes an hour but this blows it out of the water in 15mins, very pleased with this download

If you are interested in the recreation of the first moon landing in stunning detail then this is it!  This is a movie (two actually).  The first is almost 15 minutes long and goes from lift off to splashdown.  This is the highest screen resolution on the Go I have ever seen.  Real actors are used to reenact the astronauts.
At first I thought the price was a little high, but after realizing the amount of model detailing that was done, the attention to authenticity, along with the music from the orchestra and real actors used, the price is actually quite reasonable.  If you are an Apollo 11 junkie like I am then this is a must have!  Breathtaking!
